synopsis:
On the Outer Rim planet Caranthanax B, Luke Skywalker recovers from a blast Darth Vader deflected, then rallies the Rebel cyborgs of M.A.R. Corps and convinces the former Naboo handmaiden Sabé to let them evacuate. Sabé stays behind to confront Vader, who commandeers Governor Tauntaza's Death Machine and drains the life force of every living thing around him. Sensing the surge in the Force, Palpatine hurls an army of stormtroopers and Sith Eternal cultists at his apprentice to make him wield the power. Overwhelmed by the fear and deaths he feels through the Force, Vader turns his stolen energy on Palpatine himself, but the Emperor withstands the assault and reveals the whole ordeal was staged to prove that only he was ever ready for such power. Vader kneels in subservience once more.

On Coruscant, the plotters of the Schism Imperial learn that Administrator Sly Moore and even Enric Pryde were serving Palpatine all along, their coup merely a lesson to break Vader. Moore sends Ochi of Bestoon to lead a diminished Vader through an exercise back on Caranthanax B, where Vader kills two supercharged juvenile summa-verminoth and spares the children who witness it, provoking Ochi to question his mercy.

Sabé tends to the beaten Ochi, then infiltrates a Rebel evacuation to take Leia Organa's measure. Testing her under fire from probe droids, Sabé sees Padmé Amidala's strength in Leia, fears what Vader would do if he recognized it, and has Leia stunned and returned to the Rebels, judging her perfect. On Tatooine, Kitster Banai and Wald, who fled Caranthanax B with stolen power cells, use their fortune to buy the freedom of enslaved friends and reminisce about Anakin Skywalker. Raiders and then Ochi seize the power rods; Ochi spares the freed slaves and delivers the cells to Vader at Fortress Vader on Mustafar. When Ochi mentions the slaves' talk of a Jedi named Anakin Skywalker, Vader replies that Anakin Skywalker is dead.
title: Darth Vader (2020) #50
